choices.text: I was just about to head out.

whats_wrong.speaker: Rick
whats_wrong.text: Nothing's wrong. That's the problem. Everything's too quiet and that man is still in my town.

scared.speaker: Rick
scared.text: Good. You should be paying attention. Come on.

head_out.speaker: Rick
head_out.text: Not yet you're not. Two minutes.

core.speaker: Rick
core.text: I'm going to ask you something and I need a straight answer. Those things he had you do today. Did any of them feel familiar?

choices.text: Like I'd done them before. Yeah.
No. They just felt like games.

familiar_how.speaker: Rick
familiar_how.text: Like muscle memory. Like your hands knew what to do before your head caught up.

done_before.speaker: Rick
done_before.text: That's what I was afraid of.

just_games.speaker: Rick
just_games.text: That's what they're supposed to feel like.

rick_admission.speaker: Rick
rick_admission.text: I brought you here Cid. Four years ago. I vouched for you. I thought it was over.

choices.text: What do you mean you brought me here?
What was supposed to be over?

brought_here.speaker: Rick
brought_here.text: You needed somewhere safe. Somewhere off the grid. I owed someone a favor and I called it in.

what_over.speaker: Rick
what_over.text: Your assignment. They told me it was terminated. Apparently they lied.

you_knew.speaker: Rick
you_knew.text: Parts of it. Not all of it. And I'm sorry for the parts I knew.

rick_choice.speaker: Rick
rick_choice.text: I can't stop what he's doing. But you can. The question is whether you want to.

choices.text: What happens if I let him finish?
Maybe this is who I'm supposed to be.

let_finish.speaker: Rick
let_finish.text: Then you walk out of here someone else's. And you won't mind at all. That's the worst part.

stop_it.speaker: Rick
stop_it.text: Then go find Frank. He got out. He'll tell you how.

supposed_to_be.speaker: Rick
supposed_to_be.text: No. It's not. But I can't make that choice for you.

farewell.speaker: Rick
farewell.text: Whatever happens tonight Cid. You're a good kid. Always were.

greeting_return.speaker: Rick
greeting_return.text: Go. You're running out of time.
